title: HankSchenk's Create+++
description: A collection of mods for my Minecraft server that aim to make a Create Mod experience that isn't overwhelming.
body:
Hey! I'm HankSchenk! This modpack was made specifically for my Minecraft server (which you can join from my discord server) but feel free to use it for anything else as well. 

This modpack focuses on the Create Mod, with additions like Copycats+ and Create: Bits n' Bobs to make your experience better. Most other mods are decorative or QOL, plus Farmer's Delight and its addons. Enjoy!

Subscribe to my YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/@HankSchenk
